# Axe

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Axe;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Axe { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
hatchet, weapon, chop, sharp, equipment, fireman, firefighter, brigade, lumberjack, woodcutter, logger, forestry
